[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / tan

# Method: tan()

```ts
tan(angle): number;
```

Calculate the tangent of an angle.

Angles are measured in radians. Use [radians](radians.md) to convert from degrees.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `angle` | `number` | Angle in radians. |

## Returns

`number`

Tangent of the angle.

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="tan" encoded-code="--IDAuNCA_" />
